trustworthiness_notes: replay recall is lower than other classes — consistent with 02_replay_detection.py finding that replay does not shift network-layer feature space.
Claude zero-shot struggles most with replay and MITM — confirms these attack types require physical-layer or behavioral context that is not present in flow statistics.
Class imbalance handled via balanced class_weight (RF) and manual sample weights (LGB).
intended_use: ICS/OT network traffic classification. Not for safety-critical standalone use.
limitations: Trained on ICSSim v2 simulation data. Real-world OT environments may differ.
